title: Stardew Valley
description: Escape to the countryside and build a thriving farm, raise animals, and form relationships in this peaceful farming simulator.

title: Cyberpunk 2077
description: An open-world, action-adventure RPG set in Night City, a megalopolis obsessed with power, glamour and body modification.

title: Portal 2
description: Solve puzzles using portal-placement devices and outwit a sarcastic, passive-aggressive AI named GLaDOS.

title: Hades
description: Defy the god of the dead as you hack and slash out of the Underworld in this rogue-like dungeon crawler.

title: Phasmophobia
description: A 4-player online co-op psychological horror where you and your team of paranormal investigators enter haunted locations.

title: Subnautica
description: Descend into the depths of an alien underwater world, gather resources, craft submersibles, and survive mysterious creatures.

title: It Takes Two
description: Embark on the craziest journey of your life in this genre-bending platform adventure created purely for co-op.

title: Elden Ring
description: Rise, Tarnished, and be guided by grace to brandish the power of the Elden Ring and become an Elden Lord in the Lands Between.

title: Slay the Spire
description: Draft cards, discover relics, and construct a unique deck to climb a constantly changing Spire in this roguelike deckbuilder.

title: Apex Legends
description: Conquer with character in Apex Legends, a free-to-play Hero Shooter where legendary competitors battle for glory on the frontier.

title: Terraria
description: Dig, fight, explore, and build! Nothing is impossible in this action-packed adventure game. The world is your canvas.

title: Disco Elysium
description: A groundbreaking role-playing game. You're a detective with a unique skill system at your disposal and a whole city block to carve your path.

title: Left 4 Dead 2
description: Set in the zombie apocalypse, Left 4 Dead 2 is the highly anticipated sequel to the award-winning co-op shooter.

title: Among Us
description: Play online or over local WiFi with 4-15 players as you attempt to prep your spaceship for departure, but beware one or more impostors.

title: Doom Eternal
description: Hell's armies have invaded Earth. Become the Slayer in an epic single-player campaign to conquer demons across dimensions and stop the destruction.

title: Outer Wilds
description: An open-world mystery about a solar system trapped in an endless time loop. Explore ancient ruins, search for clues, and solve the loop.

title: Dead by Daylight
description: A multiplayer (4vs1) horror game where one player takes on the role of the savage Killer, and the other four play as Survivors.

title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
description: You are Geralt of Rivia, mercenary monster slayer. Before you stands a war-torn, monster-infested continent you can explore at will.

title: Sid Meier's Civilization VI
description: Civilization VI offers new ways to engage with your world: cities now physically expand across the map, active research unlocks new potentials.

title: Celeste
description: Help Madeline survive her inner demons on her journey to the top of Celeste Mountain, in a super-tight, hand-crafted platformer.
